version_description: From 1980. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/Dnx9Z1r0SDs.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
ALL NIGHT LONG
As recorded by Joe Walsh
(1980 single release)


[Intro]
[ch]E5[/ch]     [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch]     [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch]
[ch]A5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch]     [ch]A5[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
We get up early and we work all day[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D5[/ch]
We put our time in cause we like to stay up[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
All night long[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]
All night long[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
We keep on grinnin' 'til the weekend comes[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D5[/ch]
Just a pinch between your cheek and gums[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
All night long[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]
All night long[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]E5[/ch]     [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch]     [ch]A5[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Start in the morning and get the job done[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]D5[/ch]
Take care of business and we have some fun[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
All night long[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
All night long[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
We like a long neck and a good old song[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Turn it up and then we'll sing along[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#7[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Sing along[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#7[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]G#5[/ch] [ch]F#5[/ch]
 Oh, we're stayin' up all night long[/tab]
